title: Bridging Design Systems and Code with MCP and AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology presents a perspective that AI agents are transforming modern software design. The video argues that design systems and context engineering are essential for guiding intelligent agents to build consistent and correct applications using MCP.
writeup: IBM Technology argues that AI agents are reshaping software design, and that design systems paired with context engineering are what keep those agents producing consistent, correct applications. The connecting layer is MCP (Model Context Protocol), used to bridge design systems and code. The core takeaway: agents need structured context and a defined design system to build reliably, with MCP serving as the mechanism that links design intent to implementation.
